events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Since the frame cuts off the area where the fall-protection/energy boundary and crew position would be visible, I marked this `needs_more_info` (high risk) rather than pass/fail — the evidence is insufficient to confirm compliance with OSHA 1926 Subpart R tie-off/controlled decking zone requirements or AISC 303 plumb/bracing tolerances, and the required action is to obtain a wider view or ground verification before proceeding.
